g.text: 6 threads targeting hist[0] and hist[3] are serialized by the memory controller:
Result: Pipeline Serialized (Effective Throughput drops to Latency of Atomic)
Measured Bandwidth: < 5% of Peak Global Memory Bandwidth
Each threadblock maintains a private histogram in fast On-Chip Shared Memory (L1 cache speed)
Merge Phase: __syncthreads() then write to Global
